# Microsoft Graph API Changelog

## Latest Entries (February 2026)

### February 23, 2026 - Permission Changes (v1.0)
- FileStorageContainerType.Manage.All — Updated delegated permission: no longer requires admin consent
- FileStorageContainerTypeReg.Manage.All — Updated delegated permission: no longer requires admin consent
- ThreatSubmission.Read — Updated delegated permission: now requires admin consent
- ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite — Updated delegated permission: now requires admin consent

### February 19, 2026 - Workflow Administration Scope (v1.0)
- Added administrationScopeTargets relationship to the workflowBase resource, inherited by workflow and workflowVersion types (Identity and Access / Governance)

## Older Entries

### November 25, 2025 - User Inactivity Trigger (v1.0)
- Introduced the userInactivityTrigger resource for identity governance

### November 17, 2025 - Agent Sign-In Enhancement
- Added new enumeration members agentIdentityBlueprintPrincipal and agentIDuser to agentType
- Added properties agentSubjectParentId and agentSubjectType to agentSignIn resource

### November 10, 2025 - Workflow Activation Scope
- Introduced activation scope resources and activateWithScope method for managing targeted workflow executions

No March 2026 entries found.

Updated: 2026-03-29
